title: boerhavia mutabilis
intro: Boerhavia mutabilis, also known as Red Spiderling, is a perennial herb belonging to the Nyctaginaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boerhavia mutabilis include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Boerhavia mutabilis is typically prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or infusions, and can also be used as a powder or tincture for various health benefits.
